? Somehow, the shelves feel awfully empty... I'm pretty sure Elly had collected a

But it's Elly's fault... Every time we meet, she teases me, gets my dick all worked

Now, what should I do today? There's no point in earning money anymore, but maybe

...Well, whatever. I'm fine just being in this village with that girl. That alone

Thank you for playing! This concludes the game! There is no objective in this
CHAPTER. You'll just watch Elly have sex in various places.

Different events will play depending on Elly's partner, so chase after your little
sister as she fucks all sorts of men!

Also, each time the date changes, there's a chance for an Elly pregnancy event to
occur. After pregnancy, the content of her sex events with the villagers will also
change, so make sure to let \n[1] jerk off in every pattern!

If you want Elly to give birth, examine the crystal in front of the Village Chief's
house. \c[18]Please note that no matter how much time passes, she will not give birth on
her own...\c[0]

An NPC who gives hints for reaching the True Ending will now appear at night. If
you're curious about the two's other possible endings, please try to find it.

...Somehow, it tastes weird... The smell is kind of fishy, too... There's nothing
strange mixed in, right...?

...Somehow, it tastes weird... The smell is kind of fishy, or something... There's
nothing strange mixed in, right...?

Looks like you're too busy having sex with Dario to cook... Guess we'll have to skip

Elly, it looks like she doesn't even have time to go home and cook today... ...That

I'm getting hard...
Hmm, what's this...? This sweet smell, could it be...

I knew it! There are cookies inside! Did she make them for me? She carefully wrapped
them in a bag and left them here.

...Delicious. The sweets Elly makes have become more elaborate and tastier year by
year, but the first cookie I ever had from her was also really delicious...
I already threw that flower away... I hate seeing things I couldn't protect...
